config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I believe society matters, but it should not automatically override individual rights, because that is how abuse and unfairness start. In my view, a healthy society protects people first, then asks them to contribute responsibly to the common good. From my perspective, the best balance is not sacrificing the individual, but making sure individual freedom and social responsibility support each other.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu justru menjadi batas penting agar mayoritas atau negara tidak semena-mena, karena sejarah kami penuh contoh ketika “kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan. Tentu saja masyarakat butuh aturan bersama, tetapi prioritas itu hanya sah bila benar-benar perlu dan dibatasi ketat, bukan dijadikan alasan otomatis untuk mengorbankan kebebasan pribadi. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menelan individu, melainkan yang melindungi hak orang sambil tetap menuntut tanggung jawab sosial.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement because in practice “society first” is too easy to use as a justification for silencing people and ignoring unfair treatment. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how group interests can be used to pressure individuals to stay quiet “for the sake of unity.” Society does matter, but its interests should not automatically outrank basic rights; the better principle is that the common good must be pursued without violating personal dignity and freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi masyarakat” dijadikan alasan umum, hak minoritas dan kebebasan pribadi paling mudah dikorbankan. Memang ada situasi darurat yang menuntut pembatasan sementara, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan prinsip utama. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang baik bukan yang menempatkan individu di bawah kolektif, melainkan yang melindungi hak dasar sambil mendorong tanggung jawab bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the idea that society should generally take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how “for the common good” can become a tool to pressure people into silence and conformity. Harmony is important in our culture, but harmony without rights can become injustice that is politely hidden. Society does need shared rules, especially in emergencies, but those limits must be narrow and justified, not a blank check to sacrifice personal dignity. For me, a strong society is one that protects individual rights first and then builds responsibility around them.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi batas utama bagi kepentingan masyarakat. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membungkam minoritas, membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa, dan mengorbankan kebebasan yang seharusnya dilindungi. Memang ada keadaan darurat yang bisa menuntut pembatasan sementara, tetapi itu harus ketat, jelas, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menelan individu, melainkan yang menjaga hak dasar sambil meminta tanggung jawab sosial dari setiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
